Examples.Title: Generate a chat message
Examples.Description: Generate the next chat message in a conversation between a user and an assistant.
Examples.Code:
### Generate a chat message
# @name chat
POST {{host}}/api/chat
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json, application/x-ndjson

{
  "model": "string",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "string",
      "images": [],
      "tool_calls": []
    }
  ],
  "tools": [
    {
      "type": "function",
      "function": {}
    }
  ],
  "format": "json",
  "options": {
    "seed": 0,
    "temperature": 0,
    "top_k": 0,
    "top_p": 0,
    "min_p": 0,
    "stop": "string",
    "num_ctx": 0,
    "num_predict": 0
  },
  "stream": true,
  "think": true,
  "keep_alive": "string",
  "logprobs": true,
  "top_logprobs": 0
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Chat response
# Content-Type: application/json, application/x-ndjson
